name: Corn Pudding
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Butter a 2-quart casserole dish.
3. Beat eggs in a blender until smooth and well combined.
4. Add remaining ingredients (except the corn) to the blender.
5. Mix only until the corn is thoroughly incorporated into the batter.
6. Pour the mixture into the prepared casserole dish.
7. Bake for 1 hour and 10 minutes, or until firm.
